info.name: Microsoft Azure TemplateSpecsClient
info.description: The APIs listed in this specification can be used to manage Template Spec resources through the Azure Resource Manager.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Templatespecs Templatespecname Versions Templatespecversion

variable.description: (Required) Subscription Id which forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.
(Required) Name of the Template Spec.
(Required) The version of the Template Spec.

request.description: Creates or updates a Template Spec version.

response.name: OK - The Template Spec Version has been successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Template Spec Version created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Templatespecs Templatespecname Versions Templatespecversion

variable.description: (Required) Subscription Id which forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.
(Required) Name of the Template Spec.
(Required) The version of the Template Spec.

request.description: Updates Template Spec Version tags with specified values.

response.name: OK -- Template Spec Version tags are updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Templatespecs Templatespecname Versions Templatespecversion

variable.description: (Required) Subscription Id which forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.
(Required) Name of the Template Spec.
(Required) The version of the Template Spec.

request.description: Gets a Template Spec version from a specific Template Spec.

response.name: OK - Returns information about the Template Spec version.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Templatespecs Templatespecname Versions Templatespecversion

variable.description: (Required) Subscription Id which forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.
(Required) Name of the Template Spec.
(Required) The version of the Template Spec.

request.description: Deletes a specific version from a Template Spec. When operation completes, status code 200 returned without content.

response.name: OK - Template Spec Version deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Template Spec Version does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Templatespecs Templatespecname Versions

variable.description: (Required) Subscription Id which forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.
(Required) Name of the Template Spec.

request.description: Lists all the Template Spec versions in the specified Template Spec.

response.name: OK - Returns an array of Template Spec versions.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) Subscription Id which forms part of the URI for every service call.

(Required) Name of the Template Spec.

request.description: Creates or updates a Template Spec.
